SNDK SanDisk Corporation
Analiz Edilemedi
Backtest çalıştırılamadı: 344 işlem günü walk-forward için yeterli örnek üretmiyor. Özellik ısınması (~80 gün) ve 10 günlük hedef ufku düşülünce gereken ~310 örneğin altında kalıyor (≈400 temiz işlem günü / ~1,6 yıl gerekir).
Son fiyat: $2,050.39 · 344 işlem günü
Methodology. Features use only past data. The model is evaluated with expanding-window walk-forward folds; each fold trains only on observations whose 10-day forward label was realized before the test window begins (purging removes overlapping-horizon leakage). Directional accuracy is compared to a naive majority-class baseline via a one-sided binomial test; the information coefficient is the Spearman rank correlation between predicted and realized returns. The equity curve uses non-overlapping holding periods and subtracts 5 bps round-trip costs, so it reflects tradable performance rather than inflated overlapping returns.
MultiStock v24 · Honest Quantitative Backtester · June 29, 2026 · 23:12
